text: Members of the board serve staggered six-year terms, with the terms of either one or two members expiring February 1 of each odd-numbered year.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 1001. Org. of Dept.
##### § 1001.022 — Terms

Members of the board serve staggered six-year terms, with the terms of either one or two members expiring February 1 of each odd-numbered year.

*Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 933 (H.B.3097), Sec. 1.01, eff. September 1, 2009.*
